title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 16 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 16 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 16 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.82 % today, the main contract closed at 738.5. The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is better.
